name: Base64 Tool
html:
🔐 Base64 Tool

↕
css: :host { --bg: #1e293b; --card: #0f172a; --accent: #8b5cf6; display: flex; width: 100%; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: system-ui; color: white; } * { box-sizing: border-box; } .widget-card { background: var(--bg); border-radius: 16px; padding: 1rem; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .widget-title { margin: 0; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; text-align: center; } .input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; flex: 1; } label { font-size: 0.65rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: bold; } textarea { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid #334155; border-radius: 8px; color: white; padding: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; resize: none; flex: 1; min-height: 0; } .separator { text-align: center; color: var(--accent); font-weight: bold; font-size: 1rem; } .actions { display: flex; justify-content: center; } .btn-clear { background: #334155; border: none; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.7rem; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; }
js: const { root, saveState, getState } = api; const raw = root.getElementById('raw-text'); const b64 = root.getElementById('b64-text'); function encode() { try { b64.value = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(raw.value))); saveState(raw.value); } catch (error) { b64.value = 'Erreur'; } } function decode() { try { raw.value = decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(b64.value))); saveState(raw.value); } catch (error) { raw.value = 'Invalide'; } } raw.oninput = encode; b64.oninput = decode; root.getElementById('btn-clear').onclick = () => { raw.value = ''; b64.value = ''; saveState(''); }; getState().then((saved) => { if (typeof saved === 'string') { raw.value = saved; encode(); } });
